name: iots3-services
description: IoTS Project 3 — NestJS service workspaces (shared libs + services).

scripts.build: npm run build -w @iots/contracts && npm run build -w @iots/broker && npm run build -w ingestion-service && npm run build -w storage-service
scripts.build:libs: npm run build -w @iots/contracts && npm run build -w @iots/broker
scripts.test: npm run build -w @iots/contracts && npm run test -w @iots/broker
scripts.smoke: npm run build -w @iots/contracts && npm run smoke -w @iots/broker
